name: Count Limited
analysis: CUP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.0450, stop A$1.0098, target A$1.1750 (3.69:1) — then trail it.
